response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates 20 years of professional software development experience and strong communication skills, they fall far short on multiple mandatory requirements. C++ experience is documented at only ~6 months (National Instruments, 2014-2015) rather than the required 5-10 years, with primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang. No Windows platform development is evident. SQL experience is vague with no mention of SQL Server or Oracle. Capital markets domain exposure is limited to one Node.js-based investment startup role. The career trajectory is entirely web/mobile/open-source, moving away from systems-level C++ development.
strengths: Two decades of professional development experience spanning multiple domains and technologies
Proven ability to communicate and teach—multiple workshops, talks, and educational initiatives
Experience with investment/capital markets through RIDE Capital role and some CI/CD infrastructure setup
concerns: Only ~6 months documented C++ experience vs. required 5-10 years; primary languages are JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang
No evidence of Windows platform development; career built on Linux, web, and cloud environments (Docker, AWS, Kubernetes)
Limited and vague SQL experience with no mention of SQL Server or Oracle; background is primarily NoSQL (MongoDB) and web frameworks

key_factors.factor: No fixed-income or capital-markets domain expertise
